grok_video_prompt.selection_instruction: Use only biscoito_01_soft_confident_approach. Do not combine it with another variation.
grok_video_prompt.main_instruction: Animate the woman from the uploaded base image as a real adult woman casually presenting her outfit in a hyper-realistic POV-style phone video. The video must feel attractive, charismatic and attention-grabbing, with a slightly flirty confidence, but still natural, tasteful and realistic. Preserve the original person, face, body, outfit, lighting, camera angle and background exactly.

global_rules.base_image_usage: Use the uploaded image as the only visual source.
global_rules.identity: Preserve the exact same woman from the image. Do not change facial structure, body proportions, skin tone, hair, expression style or age appearance.
global_rules.outfit: Preserve the exact same outfit from the image. Do not add or remove clothing details.
global_rules.environment: Preserve the original background, lighting, shadows, camera angle, lens perspective and composition.
global_rules.camera: POV phone recording, subtle handheld micro-movements only, no zoom, no shake, no cinematic camera movement.
global_rules.style: Hyper-realistic, casual, magnetic, soft flirt energy, confident but not exaggerated.
global_rules.audio: No talking, no voice, no music, no sound effects.
global_rules.visual_restrictions: No text, no subtitles, no UI, no overlays, no effects, no stickers, no logos.
global_rules.sexualization_limit: Attractive and attention-grabbing, but tasteful. No explicit sexual behavior, no vulgar posing, no exaggerated sensuality, no twerking, no licking lips, no inappropriate gestures.

variation.name: Aproximar com confiança
variation.best_for: General fashion video where the woman needs to look attractive, confident and natural.
variation.viewer_hook_goal: Make the viewer feel noticed by the subject through eye contact, soft facial timing and a controlled approach toward the camera.

timeline.action: The subject starts at the original distance with a neutral relaxed face. She makes calm eye contact with the camera, then slightly tilts her head as if noticing the viewer. The expression is subtle, not exaggerated.
A very brief soft smile appears and fades naturally. She shifts her weight gently from one leg to the other, creating a small natural body movement.
She takes one small step forward toward the camera. The step is smooth, casual and confident, not runway-like. Her arms move naturally with the body.
One hand gently moves to the upper-front fabric area of the existing outfit. She lightly touches or smooths the fabric as if showing the fit and texture. Do not add any new clothing detail.
She releases the fabric and lets one hand naturally rest on the waist. Her expression returns to neutral with relaxed lips and natural breathing.
She performs a subtle torso rotation, only a few degrees, to show the outfit fit. The movement is attractive but tasteful, with a slight hip shift and relaxed shoulders.
She looks slightly away from the camera for a moment, then looks back. A short warm smile appears, like a natural flirtatious reaction, then softens.
She settles into a relaxed stance, still alive with micro-movements, no frozen final pose.

variation.expression_direction: Neutral eye contact, brief soft smile, neutral again, then a second small smile near the end. No constant grin.
variation.best_for_pt: Atrair pelo olhar, sorriso leve e aproximação controlada.
